title: IN2011_11.C.17_1170_202204272225
description:
New version: IN2011_11.C.17_1170_202204272225

An OxygenOS update is available. This update optimizes the stability of sending and receiving messages to make the system smoother and more stable.

System

[Optimized] the stability of sending and receiving messages

[Improved] system stability

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
